who: small law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month
offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month, missed deadlines cause penalties. We provide compliance software instead of manual tracking and filing processes.
problem: Difficulty in managing compliance deadlines and preparing regulatory filings accurately.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about compliance tools
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for law firms
try_it: Let users try Deadline tracking and Regulatory filing templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the software
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
